title: CraftCore Modpack
body:
![CraftCore Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20e6405a5aa35929bca6ed5810773798dbacf7f4.png)
The official Modpack for playing on the CraftCore Server, or in general Playing on Vanilla Minecraft Servers. It has some of the best and most important Vanilla+ Client side mods like Freecam, Xaeros Worldmap, Shader Support and so much more. But be aware, that for the use of some of these Mods you could get banned on the most Minecraft Servers like Hypixel.
# **How to Install on Modrinth**
